description: Portable static cost governance policy for Codex foundation operations. Repositories can tune budgets and supply local usage data without changing report code.

categories.title: AI-assisted Taskmaster and research commands
categories.description: Budget for AI-powered Taskmaster operations such as parse-prd, expand, update, add-task, and research-enabled planning.
notes: This repository does not query provider billing APIs.
Supply usage JSON from provider dashboards or a local ledger when you want budget classification.

categories.title: GitHub Actions CI minutes
categories.description: Budget for GitHub Actions runtime consumed by guard, CI, performance, monitoring, and report workflows.
notes: GitHub billing/minute totals are account-level data and are not available from local repo files.
Keep matrices focused and upload artifacts intentionally.

categories.title: Local agent runtime and verification effort
categories.description: Planning budget for local full-suite pytest, guard, report generation, and manual verification runtime.
notes: This category is useful for monthly process review; it does not control local CPU use.

categories.title: Report artifact storage
categories.description: Budget for retained JSON, Markdown, scanner, guard, CI, and work-tracking report artifacts.
notes: The portable foundation keeps evidence by default; storage policy should be reviewed before pruning artifacts.

non_goals: No external billing API is queried.
No provider dashboard, GitHub billing page, cloud account, or payment system is modified.
No alert, notification, issue, email, PagerDuty, or Slack message is sent.
No cache, rate limit, throttle, branch protection, or workflow state is changed based on this report.
No cost claim is made for categories without supplied usage data.
